title: REIT Fantasy Football: 11 Companies For Your Starting Lineup
text: REIT valuations are down and yields are up, making them attractive to income investors again. The article suggests a diversified REIT portfolio for beginners, with one REIT from each sector, to form a REIT fantasy football team. Different types of REITs serve different roles, including stable income, growth potential, and niche opportunities.

title: See You in September? 3 Dividend Stocks to Consider Buying This Fall
text: Vanguard Real Estate ETF is down but poised to rise as interest rates moderate or even fall. Medical Properties Trust recently took a big step to improve its financial health.

title: 7 Stocks That Wall Street Is Ignoring (But Shouldn't Be!)
text: With thousands of publicly traded securities available, it's inevitable that more than a few names will classify as under-the-radar stocks to buy for discerning investors. I don't say this to cast aspersions on any market expert.

title: Stock screen spotlights 20 companies whose 2024 earnings estimates have risen most sharply
text: With another earnings season almost complete, it might be useful for investors to look further ahead. Each earnings season, we can see 70% to 80% of the S&P 500 “beating” consensus quarterly profit estimates.

title: Daily Dividend Report: Martin Marietta Materials, Tyson Foods, Weyerhaeuser, J & J Snack Foods, Spirit Realty Capital
text: Daily Dividend Report: Martin Marietta Materials, Tyson Foods, Weyerhaeuser, J & J Snack Foods, Spirit Realty Capital

title: Weyerhaeuser Company Declares Dividend on Common Shares
text: SEATTLE , Aug. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) today announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly base cash dividend of $0.19 per share on the common stock of the company, payable in cash on September 15, 2023, to holders of record of such common stock as of the close of business on September 1, 2023. Under Weyerhaeuser's cash return framework, the company expects to supplement its quarterly base cash dividend, as appropriate, with an additional return of variable cash to achieve a targeted total return to shareholders of 75 to 80 percent of annual Adjusted Funds Available for Distribution (Adjusted FAD).

title: Weyerhaeuser: Reasons To Pursue, Reasons To Avoid
text: Single family housing conditions are picking up, but the remodeling market is faltering. WY's EWP segment looks poised to have another resilient quarter, although the export market could be weak. WY offers decent EBITDA growth relative to its peers and is priced at a significant discount.

title: Weyerhaeuser Announces Appointment of James C. O'Rourke to Board of Directors
text: SEATTLE , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Weyerhaeuser Company  (NYSE: WY) today announced the appointment of James "Joc" C. O'Rourke, president and chief executive officer and a director of The Mosaic Company, to the company's board of directors.
